description: Style NoteThese cool capris from adidas have been created with Climalite fabric which draws sweat away from your skin to keep your body dry.  Wear them with a sporty tee and sports footwear when you head out to the gymProduct DetailsBlack capris that have a broad waistband with a drawstring, gathered from the waist down on the front and back and printed logo on the left below the waistbandMaterial and Care90% polyester and 10% lycraMachine wash below 40 degrees in cold water with ike colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeCool iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height:6' and waist:32") is wearing a size M
